_comment: Conditional Access policy – TAP Portal: Require Phishing-Resistant MFA
Body: this file (remove _comment and _placeholders sections first)
Or create manually in Entra ID:
https://entra.microsoft.com → Protection → Conditional Access → + New policy
Replace ALL values marked REPLACE_WITH_* before applying.
NOTE: REPLACE_WITH_APP_CLIENT_ID is automatically replaced by deploy.ps1
when using the -ApplyConditionalAccess switch. Manual imports require
manually replacing this placeholder with your frontend app's client ID.

_placeholders.REPLACE_WITH_APP_CLIENT_ID: Client ID of the App Registration used by Azure Static Web Apps
_placeholders.REPLACE_WITH_EXCLUDE_GROUP: (Optional) Group ID of break-glass / exclusion accounts

_authStrengthNote: ID 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000004 is the built-in 'Phishing-resistant MFA' strength.
It covers: Windows Hello for Business, FIDO2 security keys (YubiKey etc.),
Or: Entra ID → Security → Authentication methods → Authentication strengths
